programme.desc:
With only 0.4m of swell and a side wind, even the clams are staying home today.
🌊 Swell: 0.4m @ 14s 💨 Wind: 22.0km/h S (CROSS) 💨 Gusts: 46.0km/h 🌊 Wind waves: 0.5m
📋 Essentially flat

programme.title: 😴 0.4m @ 14s ONSHORE
programme.desc:
At 0.4m, might be better to watch the wind blow sand.
🌊 Swell: 0.4m @ 14s 💨 Wind: 24.0km/h SSW (ONSHORE) 💨 Gusts: 40.0km/h 🌊 Wind waves: 0.5m
📋 Onshore wind making it messy • Essentially flat

Half a meter and a crosswind suggests the best action is finding a less windy cafe.

programme.title: 😴 0.4m @ 14s CROSS
programme.desc:
At half a metre, the only thrills here today will be dodging dog walkers.
🌊 Swell: 0.4m @ 14s 💨 Wind: 24.0km/h SSW (CROSS) 💨 Gusts: 40.0km/h 🌊 Wind waves: 0.5m

programme.desc:

programme.title: 😴 0.4m @ 14s OFFSHORE

programme.desc:

programme.title: 🌊 0.6m @ 7s CROSS
programme.desc:
With a crumbly 0.6m swell and that wind, you'll be fighting for scraps and likely losing.
🌊 Swell: 0.6m @ 7s 💨 Wind: 22.0km/h S (CROSS) 💨 Gusts: 46.0km/h 🌊 Wind waves: 0.9m
📋 Short period - weaker waves

programme.title: 💨 0.5m @ 14s ONSHORE
programme.desc:
The 0.5m swell might provide a ripple or two, mostly for the seabirds to enjoy.
🌊 Swell: 0.5m @ 14s 💨 Wind: 21.0km/h SSW (ONSHORE) 💨 Gusts: 40.0km/h 🌊 Wind waves: 0.8m

programme.title: 🌊 0.5m @ 14s CROSS
programme.desc:
At half a meter with this wind, you're more likely to get blown to Spain than barrelled.
🌊 Swell: 0.5m @ 14s 💨 Wind: 21.0km/h SSW (CROSS) 💨 Gusts: 40.0km/h 🌊 Wind waves: 0.8m

programme.title: 🌊 0.5m @ 14s CROSS

programme.title: 🌊 0.5m @ 14s CROSS
programme.desc:
Those 0.5m ripples might be rideable, provided you enjoy paddling against a headwind.
🌊 Swell: 0.5m @ 14s 💨 Wind: 21.0km/h SSW (CROSS) 💨 Gusts: 40.0km/h 🌊 Wind waves: 0.8m

programme.title: 🌊 0.5m @ 14s OFFSHORE
programme.desc:
At half a meter, you'll be fighting for scraps, but at least the offshore breeze is keeping them tidy.
🌊 Swell: 0.5m @ 14s 💨 Wind: 21.0km/h SSW (OFFSHORE) 💨 Gusts: 40.0km/h 🌊 Wind waves: 0.8m

programme.title: 🌊 0.5m @ 6s OFFSHORE
programme.desc:

🌊 Swell: 0.5m @ 6s 💨 Wind: 21.0km/h SSW (OFFSHORE) 💨 Gusts: 40.0km/h 🌊 Wind waves: 0.8m

programme.title: 🌊 0.5m @ 6s OFFSHORE
programme.desc:
